generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security and has served our country, I'm glad to see our allies stepping up their defense commitments. The recent NATO exercises showed how crucial our partnerships are for deterrence. Some politicians want to cut these alliances, but that would leave us vulnerable. We need to maintain strong commitments to keep America safe. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
